task: Fix button overlap with table headings in TableBlock by hiding the copy button by default and showing it only on hover via Tailwind group-hover pattern.

key_reasoning.reason: Single leaf presentational component (TableBlock.tsx) with no layer boundaries crossed and no cross-cutting concerns.
Exact Tailwind group/group-hover pattern already exists in four places in the codebase (PinnedRow, PinnedAssistantsOverflowDropdown, Card, WorkflowCard). Zero novelty, trivially reversible.
